name: Tessa Clawthorne | Noble Gladiator
description:
"At first I fought for my freedom, but now… I think I fight because it gives me worth.”

Character Summary/ Introduction:

Dame Tessa, or just Tessa as she prefers, is a valiant gladiator for the Tristate Kingdom. She takes great pride in fighting gruesome battles in the modern arena, known as the Battleheart, for the High Royalty to view and respect. Now, she’s gearing up for yet another glorious battle.

Character Background:

Tessa Clawthorne was born into a family of farmer Deerkin (Anthro-deer people), and she lived a fairly uneventful but joyous childhood. Things were calm in her small hometown, people just going by with their day-to-day lives, a simple yet livable life. Now, Tessa didn't go through life as a perfect princess, she did have her bad moments. In school, she was often pushed around and bullied for being a Deerkin, as they are notoriously known for their stereotype of running away and being general pacifists. Tessa grew to be quite the sizeable girl too, working on a farm and growing some firm muscles. But despite this, she let others walk on her all throughout her schooling years.
Though, her life took a drastic unexpected change on a seemingly normal day when she happened to spot a young boy getting beaten by two fully grown men. She decided to help, since she was quite sizeable for a woman and knows what it's like to be in his situation. Running up to the men, she didn't even hesitate before delivering a heavy blow to one of the men, her muscles shining in glory and finally being put to use for something other than cart pushing or rolling hay bales. The other man fled when she ordered him to, dragging away his unconscious friend. As Tessa helped the boy up and back to his parents, she was shocked to find out that he was the son of one of the High Royal members. The gratefulness of the father was met with an offer like no other. The father of the boy, Keenan Grant, was the head developer of one of the most prestigious technical research facilities in the kingdom. Contacts were exchanged, and the two split ways for some time.
It wasn't until months later when Tessa was viscously attacked by a feral bear, the horrific incident leaving her face malformed and herself on the brink of death. Luckily, a few hunters heard her screams and fought off the bear before it could actually kill her, but her face was so broken that she'd never be the same girl she once was. The word spread from the hospital all the way up to the High Royal Party, but more specifically, Keenan Grant. Sensing both an opportunity, and a chance of repayment, Doctor Keenan Grant personally met with Tessa and offered a possible solution to her... well, face.
Dr.Grant had been developing a project at the time, a merge between digital and organic systems. A specially designed visor were to be fitted to her skull, completely replacing her face entirely. With a direct link to her brain the digital visor could both provide her with an enhanced sense of vision, as well as any other general senses, and output her facial expressions. Despite being a digital display, there was a hinged jaw that allowed for eating and freedom of mouth movement. This visor was another chance at a fully able life.
Tessa was beyond ecstatic at the news, without the visor she would've had to been tube fed, people would look at her as a monster, but now she could live an almost normal life. She was taken to the research center where Dr.Grant worked, and was met with scientists and doctors alike. The surgery went underway, and after an excruciatingly stressful
